claims.text: The two largest incumbents in LATAM together hold no more than 18% of the market, with the remainder fragmented across smaller regional players we believe we can outcompete on product.
Time-to-hire for engineering roles dropped from 68 days to 41 days year over year, supporting the team's view that the talent market has loosened.
The CEO has indicated a preference for moving quickly once a direction is set, though no formal deadline has been imposed.
The original founders divested in 2016, and the current ownership structure has remained stable since the recapitalization.
In the past twelve months, seventeen of our existing enterprise customers have asked specifically for service in LATAM, and sales has been turning these requests away.
Conference attendance at the leading industry event was up notably this spring, suggesting renewed interest in the space.
The team last conducted a major strategic review in 2019, which produced the operating model still in place today.
Regulatory requirements in LATAM map cleanly onto controls we already operate in our current jurisdictions, so the compliance build is incremental rather than greenfield.
The customer success and implementation teams have completed scenario planning and have committed to standing up the regional operation without diluting service levels in our existing markets.
Average deal cycle on six-figure contracts shortened from 87 days to 71 days over the past year, in line with the legal team's renegotiated MSA template.
Most of the analytical work has been performed in-house, with occasional input from a former operator who consults independently.
Cost per acquired customer in the consumer channel fell 22% over the trailing year, which the marketing team attributes to improved creative testing.
Two of our top three global system integrator partners already have a meaningful presence in LATAM and have indicated they can lead implementations once we are live in the region.
Inbound demo requests climbed 38% in the past two quarters, which the growth team attributes to the refreshed positioning.
The addressable market for our category in LATAM is approximately $420M annually, which exceeds the threshold the finance team uses to justify a regional entry.

memo.recommendation: We recommend launching commercial operations in LATAM within the back half of next year, beginning with a regional team of approximately fifteen people.
memo.title: Recommendation: Regional Expansion into LATAM

claims.text: Conference attendance at the leading industry event was up notably this spring, suggesting renewed interest in the space.
The cross-functional working group includes representatives from finance, operations, and corporate development, and meets weekly.
Inbound demo requests climbed 38% in the past two quarters, which the growth team attributes to the refreshed positioning.
The previous CFO had championed a different framework for this kind of decision and left the company before the current cycle began.
Support ticket volume per active customer fell 19% year over year, which the support team attributes to the new self-service portal.
The finance team has modeled the resulting savings and projects a 18% reduction in fully-loaded operating cost for the affected functions, sustained over a full operating year.
Gross retention in the SMB segment improved from 84% to 89% over two quarters, which the customer success team links to the new onboarding flow.
People operations has scoped the transition plan and confirmed the change can be executed within a single quarter with limited disruption to ongoing customer-facing work.
Time-to-hire for engineering roles dropped from 68 days to 41 days year over year, supporting the team's view that the talent market has loosened.
The two senior leaders whose accountability changes most under the proposed structure have reviewed the design in detail and committed in writing to the new operating model.
The proposed structure consolidates accountability into single functional owners and removes the dotted-line reporting that the diagnostic identifies as the primary source of the overhead.
The root cause of the coordination overhead has been traced to duplicative reporting lines created during three successive reorganizations, none of which fully retired the prior structure.

Two lighter-weight alternatives -- a reporting-line refactor only and a cross-functional council -- have been considered and rejected by the operating committee on the grounds that neither addresses the root cause identified in the diagnostic.
Cost per acquired customer in the consumer channel fell 22% over the trailing year, which the marketing team attributes to improved creative testing.

Time-and-motion analysis indicates that 18% of senior manager time across the affected functions is spent on coordination rather than execution, which the operations committee considers structurally unsustainable.

memo.recommendation: We recommend the executive committee approve the proposed restructuring of the affected functions, to be executed within the next quarter.
memo.title: Recommendation: Organizational Restructuring

Customer success has interviewed the largest fifteen customers of the Forge IDE and confirmed that deprecation will not trigger churn on the broader contract, because the product is not renewal-critical for any of them.
The company's office footprint expanded by approximately 18% last year following the lease signing in the second city.
The engineering investment required to keep the Forge IDE competitive over the next two years is approximately $33M, which the team assesses as better deployed on higher-growth lines.

Revenue from the Forge IDE has been declining at 9% annually, with the trend accelerating over the past three quarters and no clear path to reversal under the current strategy.

claims.text: Time-and-motion analysis indicates that 13% of senior manager time across the affected functions is spent on coordination rather than execution, which the operations committee considers structurally unsustainable.
People operations has scoped the transition plan and confirmed the change can be executed within a single quarter with limited disruption to ongoing customer-facing work.
Three previous attempts to reorganize this part of the business predated the current leadership team and are widely considered to have been mistimed.

Inbound demo requests climbed 38% in the past two quarters, which the growth team attributes to the refreshed positioning.

The proposed structure consolidates accountability into single functional owners and removes the dotted-line reporting that the diagnostic identifies as the primary source of the overhead.

Demand modeling across our top three customer segments suggests a price increase of 11% would produce conversion impact smaller than the corresponding revenue lift in every segment tested.

Customer interviews indicate that our pricing has been interpreted by some prospects as a signal of weaker capability, and the proposed increase aligns price with how the market currently positions us.
Existing contracted customers are grandfathered for the duration of their current term, which insulates the immediate renewal book from any reactive churn.

memo.recommendation: We recommend a list-price increase on the Forge IDE of approximately 22%, effective at the start of next fiscal year.
memo.title: Recommendation: Price Increase on the Forge IDE

claims.text: Once synthetic data generation ships, the platform team estimates that switching costs for customers who adopt it will rise materially, strengthening retention on the segment most exposed to competitive pressure.
Gross retention in the SMB segment improved from 84% to 89% over two quarters, which the customer success team links to the new onboarding flow.
Internal API uptime reached 99.94% last quarter, exceeding the previously stated 99.9% target, in part because of the new redundancy work shipped in Q1.
Most of the analytical work has been performed in-house, with occasional input from a former operator who consults independently.
Cost per acquired customer in the consumer channel fell 22% over the trailing year, which the marketing team attributes to improved creative testing.
Analyst coverage of the category has expanded recently, with two additional sell-side firms initiating coverage in the last quarter.
Time-to-hire for engineering roles dropped from 68 days to 41 days year over year, supporting the team's view that the talent market has loosened.
synthetic data generation is the single most frequently cited reason we lose competitive deals, according to win/loss interviews completed by the revenue operations team.
71% of our pipeline value over the next four quarters is attached to opportunities where synthetic data generation is a stated buying criterion.
The available acquisition options in this space carry valuations above $12.1M for assets that materially overlap our existing platform, which makes build more capital-efficient than buy.
Conference attendance at the leading industry event was up notably this spring, suggesting renewed interest in the space.
The platform engineering team has scoped the build and estimates a credible time-to-production of nine to eleven months, well inside the window competitive accounts have asked us to commit to.

memo.recommendation: We recommend funding a dedicated program to build synthetic data generation over the next two quarters, with a target ship date in the back half of the first year.
memo.title: Recommendation: Investment in synthetic data generation

claims.text: Conference attendance at the leading industry event was up notably this spring, suggesting renewed interest in the space.
Cost-to-serve in MENA is modeled at approximately 57% of our current blended COGS, which keeps the regional operation contribution-positive within twelve months on the team's forecast.
Three previous attempts to reorganize this part of the business predated the current leadership team and are widely considered to have been mistimed.
In the past twelve months, thirty-one of our existing enterprise customers have asked specifically for service in MENA, and sales has been turning these requests away.
Inbound demo requests climbed 38% in the past two quarters, which the growth team attributes to the refreshed positioning.
The team has been working closely with outside counsel and a specialist financial advisor throughout the review.
Average deal cycle on six-figure contracts shortened from 87 days to 71 days over the past year, in line with the legal team's renegotiated MSA template.
Time-to-hire for engineering roles dropped from 68 days to 41 days year over year, supporting the team's view that the talent market has loosened.
Regulatory requirements in MENA map cleanly onto controls we already operate in our current jurisdictions, so the compliance build is incremental rather than greenfield.
The customer success and implementation teams have completed scenario planning and have committed to standing up the regional operation without diluting service levels in our existing markets.
Internal API uptime reached 99.94% last quarter, exceeding the previously stated 99.9% target, in part because of the new redundancy work shipped in Q1.
The two largest incumbents in MENA together hold no more than 18% of the market, with the remainder fragmented across smaller regional players we believe we can outcompete on product.
Support ticket volume per active customer fell 19% year over year, which the support team attributes to the new self-service portal.
The addressable market for our category in MENA is approximately $95M annually, which exceeds the threshold the finance team uses to justify a regional entry.
Two of our top three global system integrator partners already have a meaningful presence in MENA and have indicated they can lead implementations once we are live in the region.

memo.recommendation: We recommend launching commercial operations in MENA within the next 12 months, beginning with a regional team of approximately fifteen people.
memo.title: Recommendation: Regional Expansion into MENA

Regulatory bodies in two adjacent jurisdictions have published consultation papers on related topics, but none have proposed binding rules.
